scripts.build:app: npm run check:artifact-runtime-sources && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm run build:app
scripts.check:app: npm run check:artifact-runtime-sources && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.check: npm run build:deps && npm run check:app
scripts.test:clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('./dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('./tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });"
scripts.test:prepare:app: npm run check:artifact-runtime-sources && npm run test:clean && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json
scripts.test:prepare: npm run build:deps && npm run test:prepare:app
